'''Kanaver''' was one of the [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] once ruled by the [[Livien League]], before being conquered by [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] in [[25,130 BBY]]. Located within the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]], on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], it would later join the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and eventually the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

By the [[Post-Imperial era/Legends|Post-Imperial Period]], Kanaver had re-emerged as a prominent trading center near the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]], the [[Back Spiral]] worlds and the [[Overic Griplink/Legends|Overic Griplink]].

{{Planet-stub}}
